title: Paige Norris Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Paige Norris Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Paige Norris
Align Student
MS in Data Science ’24
Portland Campus
Before she was a data scientist, Paige Norris interned at a national laboratory. When their resident data scientist quit, she begged her bosses to let her try the role. It didn’t take long for her initial interest to grow into a passion for the field, leading her to fully transition her career through the Align program.
Maine is beautiful. Portland is astounding. Everybody here is just so lovely and so excited to be here. And it’s really a great investment. It’s already paid for itself tenfold
Paige Norris, MSDS ’24
Explore all Khoury Stories
